PARAM.description: All the x-coordinates of the interpolation points, sorted in increasing order
PARAM.name: xval
PARAM.content: All the x-coordinates of the interpolation points, sorted in increasing order

PARAM.description: All the y-coordinates of the interpolation points, sorted in increasing order
PARAM.name: yval
PARAM.content: All the y-coordinates of the interpolation points, sorted in increasing order

PARAM.description: The values of the interpolation points on all the grid knots: f(xval[i], yval[j])
PARAM.name: fval
PARAM.content: The values of the interpolation points on all the grid knots: f(xval[i], yval[j])

RETURN.description: a function which interpolates the dataset.
RETURN.content: a function which interpolates the dataset.

THROWS.description: if any of the arrays has zero length.
THROWS.name: NoDataException
THROWS.content: if any of the arrays has zero length.

THROWS.description: if the array lengths are inconsistent.
THROWS.name: DimensionMismatchException
THROWS.content: if the array lengths are inconsistent.

THROWS.description: if the array is not sorted.
THROWS.name: NonMonotonicSequenceException
THROWS.content: if the array is not sorted.

THROWS.description: if the number of points is too small for the order of the interpolation.
THROWS.name: NumberIsTooSmallException
THROWS.content: if the number of points is too small for the order of the interpolation
